title: Create Read Activity: With Scripture + Custom Block

readBlocks.title: Genesis 1:1-2
readBlocks.content: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth. Now the earth was formless and empty, darkness was over the surface of the deep, and the Spirit of God was hovering over the waters.

# God was not created

God wasn't created — He was **before all things**.

- He created space and time
- He created gravity and light
- He is eternal and self-existing

> In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.

This is a foundational truth of the Christian faith.

readBlocks.title: John 1:1-3
readBlocks.content: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God. He was with God in the beginning. Through him all things were made; without him nothing was made that has been made.
